fn_ap_GetAge:
/**
*Purpose            : 唱捞沥焊甫府畔茄促. 
*Record Set         : 绝澜
*Error Code         : 绝澜 
*History            : 2008-10-20 Jaewon Ryu 弥檬累己
*/

CREATE FUNCTION [dbo].[fn_ap_GetAge]
(
  @legalBirthday	DATETIME	-- 过利积斥岿老
, @today			DATETIME	-- 坷疵狼朝楼
)
RETURNS INT
AS
BEGIN
	DECLARE	@age INT

	SET	@age = DATEDIFF (yy, @legalBirthday, @today)
	SET	@age = CASE WHEN DATEADD(yy, @age, @legalBirthday) > @today THEN @age -1 ELSE @age END

	RETURN @age
END
fn_ap_GetBlockFlag:
/**
*Purpose            : 拌沥呕硼脚没咯何甫府畔茄促. 
*Record Set         : 绝澜
*Error Code         : 绝澜 
*History            : 2008-10-20 Jaewon Ryu 弥檬累己
*/

CREATE FUNCTION [dbo].[fn_ap_GetBlockFlag] 
(
  @gameAccountNo		INT		-- 霸烙拌沥锅龋
, @accountStatusCode	INT		-- 拌沥惑怕内靛
)
RETURNS INT
AS
BEGIN
	IF @accountStatusCode IN (3, 4)
		RETURN 1

	RETURN 0
END
fn_ap_GetBlockFlag2:
/**
*Purpose            : 拌沥力犁沥焊甫府畔茄促. 
*Record Set         : 绝澜
*Error Code         : 绝澜 
*History            : 2008-10-20 Jaewon Ryu 弥檬累己
*/

CREATE FUNCTION [dbo].[fn_ap_GetBlockFlag2] 
(
  @gameAccountNo	INT			-- 霸烙拌沥锅龋
, @restrictFlag		BIT			-- 霸烙拌沥力犁咯何
, @today			DATETIME	-- 坷疵狼朝楼
)
RETURNS INT
AS
BEGIN
	DECLARE @restrictionReasonCode	INT

	IF @restrictFlag = 1
	BEGIN
		SELECT	@restrictionReasonCode = gameRestrictionReasonCode
		FROM	Restriction
		WHERE	gameAccountNo = @gameAccountNo
		AND		restrictionStartDate <= @today
		AND		restrictionEndDate >= @today

		RETURN @restrictionReasonCode
	END
	ELSE
	BEGIN
	   IF (EXISTS(SELECT * FROM admin_list WHERE admin_id = @gameAccountNo))
		    RETURN 0
	   DECLARE @ip varchar(15) = '127.0.0.1'
		 DECLARE @mac varchar(20) = '00-00-00-00-00-00'
		 DECLARE @hardware varchar(16) = '0000000000000000'
		 SELECT @ip = last_ip, @mac = last_mac, @hardware = hardware FROM AccountETC WHERE gameAccountNo = @gameAccountNo

	END
	RETURN 0
END

)

AS
BEGIN	
	RETURN 0
END
fn_ap_GetFatigueId:
/**
*Purpose            : 乔肺档 ID 府畔
*Record Set         : 乔肺档ID
*Error Code         : 绝澜 
*History            : 2010-03-26 samuel281(冠己快) 弥檬累己
*/

CREATE FUNCTION [dbo].[fn_ap_GetFatigueId]
(
  @gameAccountNo	INT		-- 霸烙 拌沥 锅龋
)
RETURNS INT
AS
BEGIN
	DECLARE @fcid INT;
	SELECT  @fcid = linkTargetNo
	FROM	AccountLink ( NOLOCK )
	WHERE	gameAccountNo = @gameAccountNo

	IF @fcid = NULL
	BEGIN
		SET @fcid = 0
	END
	RETURN @fcid
END
fn_ap_GetKind:
/**
*Purpose            : 서버 종류 및 형태를 리턴한다.  
*Record Set         : 없음 
*Error Code         : 없음  
*History            : 2008-10-20 Jaewon Ryu 최초 작성
					  2011-09-08 Wonwoo Choi 추가 개발	
						상용 초보 서버 추가
						테스트 초보 서버 추가
					  2014-10-13 Wonoo choi 추가
						상용 특화 서버 추가 - 1025
						테섭 특화 서버 추가 - 1028
						 
*/

CREATE	FUNCTION [dbo].[fn_ap_GetKind]
(
  @gameServerTypeCode	INT		-- 게임 서버 유형 코드
, @customizeAttribute	INT		-- 게임 별 게임 서버 정의 코드
)
RETURNS INT
AS
BEGIN
	DECLARE	@kind	INT
	SET @kind = 0

	IF @gameServerTypeCode = 1
		SET @kind = 1
	ELSE IF @gameServerTypeCode = 2
		SET @kind = 4
	ELSE IF @gameServerTypeCode = 4	-- 상용 초보서버
		SET @kind = 257
	ELSE IF @gameServerTypeCode = 5	-- 테스트 초보서버
		SET @kind = 260
	ELSE IF @gameServerTypeCode = 6	-- 상용 특화 서버 추가
		SET @kind = 1025
    ELSE IF @gameServerTypeCode = 7	-- 테섭 특화 서버 추가
		SET @kind = 1028

	IF @gameServerTypeCode = 3
		SET @kind = @kind | 8

	IF @customizeAttribute & 0x02 = 0x02
		SET @kind = @kind | 2

	IF @customizeAttribute & 0x04 = 0x04
		SET @kind = @kind | 16

	RETURN @kind
END
fn_ap_GetLoginFlag:
/**
*Purpose            : 荤侩磊何啊沥焊内靛府畔 
*Record Set         : 绝澜
*Error Code         : 绝澜 
*History            : 2008-10-20 Jaewon Ryu 弥檬累己
*/

CREATE	FUNCTION [dbo].[fn_ap_GetLoginFlag]
(
  @gameAccountNo			INT				-- 霸烙拌沥锅龋
, @noticeFlag				BIT				-- 舅覆蜡屈汲沥咯何
, @authLimitTypeBitSet		INT				-- 牢刘力茄汲沥
, @gameAccountGradeCode		SMALLINT		-- 霸烙拌沥殿鞭内靛
, @today					DATETIME		-- 坷疵狼朝楼
)
RETURNS INT
AS
BEGIN
	DECLARE	@loginFlag		INT
	SET @loginFlag = 0

	IF @noticeFlag = 1
	BEGIN
		SELECT	@loginFlag = 
					ISNULL(
						SUM( DISTINCT 
							CASE noticeTypeCode
								WHEN 3 THEN 1
								WHEN 4 THEN 2
							END
						)
						, 0
					)
		FROM	AccountLoginNotice
		WHERE	gameAccountNo = @gameAccountNo
		AND		noticeStartDate <= @today
		AND		noticeEndDate >= @today
	END

	IF @authLimitTypeBitSet = 0
		SET @loginFlag = @loginFlag | 32

	IF @authLimitTypeBitSet & 2 = 2
		SET @loginFlag = @loginFlag | 16
	
	IF @gameAccountGradeCode = 2
		SET @loginFlag = @loginFlag | 256

	IF @gameAccountGradeCode = 3
		SET @loginFlag = @loginFlag | 1024

	RETURN @loginFlag
END
fn_ap_GetOtpFlag:
/**
*Purpose            : OTP 荤侩咯何府畔
*Record Set         : 绝澜
*Error Code         : 绝澜 
*History            : 2008-10-20 Jaewon Ryu 弥檬累己
*/

CREATE FUNCTION [dbo].[fn_ap_GetOtpFlag]
(
  @gameAccountNo		INT		-- 霸烙拌沥锅龋
)
RETURNS INT
AS
BEGIN
	DECLARE	@securityStatusCode	SMALLINT
	
	SET		@securityStatusCode	= 0

	SELECT	@securityStatusCode = accountSecurityStatusCode
	FROM	AccountSecurityService
	WHERE	gameAccountNo = @gameAccountNo
	AND		accountSecurityMethodCode = 1

	RETURN	@securityStatusCode
END
fn_ap_GetPcRegisterFlag:
CREATE FUNCTION [dbo].[fn_ap_GetPcRegisterFlag]
(
  @gameAccountNo		INT		-- 게임 계정 번호
)
RETURNS INT
AS
BEGIN
	DECLARE	@securityStatusCode	SMALLINT
	
	SET	@securityStatusCode	= 0

	SELECT	@securityStatusCode = accountSecurityStatusCode
	FROM	dbo.AccountSecurityService
	WHERE	gameAccountNo = @gameAccountNo
	AND	accountSecurityMethodCode = 2

	RETURN	@securityStatusCode
END
fn_ap_GetPkFlag:
/**
*Purpose            : 霸烙辑滚pk咯何府畔
*Record Set         : 绝澜
*Error Code         : 绝澜 
*History            : 2008-10-20 Jaewon Ryu 弥檬累己
*/

CREATE	FUNCTION [dbo].[fn_ap_GetPkFlag]
(
  @customizeAttribute	INT			-- 霸烙喊霸烙辑滚汲沥
)
RETURNS TINYINT
AS
BEGIN
	DECLARE	@pkFlag	TINYINT

	IF @customizeAttribute & 0x01 = 0x01
		SET @pkFlag = 1
	ELSE
		SET @pkFlag = 0

	RETURN @pkFlag
END

	RETURN 0

fn_ap_GetServiceFlag:
/**
*Purpose            : 何啊辑厚胶内靛(骏牧飘费, 荐硅磊) 府畔.
*Record Set         : 绝澜
*Error Code         : 绝澜 
*History            : 2008-10-20 Jaewon Ryu 弥檬累己
*/

CREATE FUNCTION [dbo].[fn_ap_GetServiceFlag]
(
  @gameAccountNo	INT			-- 霸烙拌沥锅龋
, @today			DATETIME	-- 坷疵狼朝楼
)
RETURNS INT
AS
BEGIN
	DECLARE	@serviceCode	INT
	SET		@serviceCode = 0

	SELECT	@serviceCode = @serviceCode | 1
	FROM	AccountSecurityService
	WHERE	gameAccountNo = @gameAccountNo
	AND		accountSecurityMethodCode = 3

	SELECT	@serviceCode = @serviceCode | 2
	FROM	AccountLoginNotice
	WHERE	gameAccountNo = @gameAccountNo
	AND		noticeTypeCode = 5
	AND		noticeStartDate <= @today
	AND		noticeEndDate >= @today

	RETURN	@serviceCode
END
fn_ap_GetSSN:
/**
*Purpose            : 林刮殿废锅龋 府畔
*Record Set         : 绝澜 
*Error Code         : 绝澜  
*History            : 2008-10-20 Jaewon Ryu 弥檬 累己
*                   : 2012-05-29 Lee Hyundo 积斥岿老狼 函券 鞘靛 搬苞甫 6臂磊肺 函版 
*/

CREATE FUNCTION [dbo].[fn_ap_GetSSN]
(
  @legalBirthday	SMALLDATETIME		-- 过利 积斥岿老
, @genderCode		SMALLINT			-- 己喊
)
RETURNS CHAR(13)
AS
BEGIN
	RETURN	(CONVERT(char(6), @legalBirthday, 12) + CONVERT(char(1), @genderCode) + '000000')
END
fn_ap_GetTasFlag:
/**
*Purpose            : 傈拳牢刘辑厚胶(NCTAS) 荤侩咯何府畔
*Record Set         : 绝澜
*Error Code         : 绝澜 
*History            : 2009-07-09 Seunghyeon Choe 弥檬累己
*/

CREATE FUNCTION [dbo].[fn_ap_GetTasFlag]
(
  @gameAccountNo		INT		-- 霸烙拌沥锅龋
)
RETURNS INT
AS
BEGIN
	DECLARE	@securityStatusCode	SMALLINT
	
	SET		@securityStatusCode	= 0

	SELECT	@securityStatusCode = accountSecurityStatusCode
	FROM	AccountSecurityService
	WHERE	gameAccountNo = @gameAccountNo
	AND		accountSecurityMethodCode = 5		-- 1 NCOTP, 2 PC殿废辑厚胶, 3 mControl, 4 焊救墨靛, 5 NCTAS

	RETURN	@securityStatusCode
END
fn_ap_GetWarnFlag:
/**  
*Purpose            : 版绊内靛府畔(荤侩救窃)  
*Record Set         : 绝澜  
*Error Code         : 绝澜   
*History            : 2008-10-20 Jaewon Ryu 弥檬累己 
*/  
  
CREATE FUNCTION [dbo].[fn_ap_GetWarnFlag]   
(  
  @gameAccountNo INT   -- 霸烙拌沥锅龋 
, @warningFlag  BIT   -- 版绊内靛汲沥咯何 
, @today   DATETIME -- 坷疵狼朝楼 
)  
RETURNS INT  
AS  
BEGIN  
 DECLARE @noticeFlag INT  
 SET @noticeFlag = 0  
  
 IF @warningFlag = 1  
 BEGIN  
  SELECT @noticeFlag = ISNULL(SUM( DISTINCT POWER(2, noticeTypeCode - 1)), 0)  
  FROM AccountLoginNotice   
  WHERE  gameAccountNo = @gameAccountNo   
  AND  noticeTypeCode NOT IN (3, 4)  
  AND  noticeStartDate <= @today   
  AND  noticeEndDate >= @today  
 END  
  
 RETURN @noticeFlag  
END
